data.body: I think that depends upon how abjectly Trump craters. But the prospects for the Senate are beside the current point, because BOTH impeachment-and-removal and 25A removal require two-thirds of the Senate. They're *equal* by that measure, while I&R is simpler and more plausible in *every other* way.
